description: This file defines the 'AuditLog' entity class for persisting audit log entries related to user actions such as registration, login attempts, and verification. It includes fields for action type, email, source IP, timestamp, and optional metadata, along with constructors and getter/setter methods.

classes.name: AuditLog
classes.description: Entity class representing an audit log record containing details of user actions for auditing purposes.

methods.name: AuditLog
methods.description: Parameterized constructor for creating AuditLog with specified action, email, source IP, and meta data; sets timestamp to current time.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique ID of the audit log record.

methods.name: getAction
methods.description: Returns the action type stored in the log.

methods.name: setAction
methods.description: Sets the action type for the log.

methods.name: getEmail
methods.description: Returns the email associated with the action, if any.

methods.name: setEmail
methods.description: Sets the email associated with the log.

methods.name: getSourceIp
methods.description: Returns the source IP address from which the action originated.

methods.name: getTimestamp
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of when the action was recorded.

methods.name: setTimestamp
methods.description: Sets the timestamp for the log entry.

methods.name: getMeta
methods.description: Returns optional metadata related to the action.

methods.name: setMeta
methods.description: Sets optional metadata for the log.
